allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U outhorninvuth -d postgres -c "SELECT version\(\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U outhorninvuth -d postgres -c "\\d users")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U outhorninvuth -d postgres -c "SELECT id, username, password FROM users ORDER BY id;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD= psql "postgresql://outhorninvuth:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable" -c "SELECT current_user, current_database\(\), ssl FROM pg_stat_ssl WHERE pid = pg_backend_pid\(\);")
